reviews.comment:
Pase de noche solo cobran con tarjeta, la mitad de la estación estaba en construcción. Buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
Night pass only accepted by card; half the station was under construction. Good service.

reviews.comment:
Por mas grande que hayan hecho la estacion, la carga sigue siendo lentisima

(Translated by Google)
No matter how big they've made the station, charging is still incredibly slow.

reviews.comment:
Hicieron mejoras y el salón es confortable. Diseño renovado. Algo confusa y peligrosa la salida al Sureste, hacia la Ruta 22

(Translated by Google)
They made improvements and the lounge is comfortable. Updated design. The exit to the southeast, towards Route 22, is somewhat confusing and dangerous.
